title: bidens socorrensis
intro: Bidens socorrensis, also known as the Bidens or Spanish needles, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bidens socorrensis include its ability to treat various conditions, such as wounds, fever, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Bidens socorrensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
